SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED., SEP-12-2012: STUART J. HAYS, ESQ. FOR APPELLANT BREAKAWAY PERFORMANCE CENTERS; RESPONDENT WAYNE ROBERT SPAULDING IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

THE COURT HEARS TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND REVIEWS PREVIOUSLY DOCUMENTATION. AFTER HEARING ADDITIONAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY COUNSEL HAYS AND BY RESPONDENT SPAULDING, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

JPT MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D525)
